steps.title: Welcome to Sajni.
steps.blurb: Your second brain in one quiet codex. Notes, journal, tasks, habits, finance — all in one place, all yours.

steps.title: Today
steps.blurb: Start every morning here. A single page that pulls your tasks, habits, and what mattered yesterday.

steps.title: Projects
steps.blurb: Turn scattered thoughts into structured projects — and chat with Sajni in the same place. Sajni connects related cards and surfaces the gaps.

steps.title: Journal
steps.blurb: One entry per day. Mood, location, attachments. Reflection that compounds.

steps.title: Tasks
steps.blurb: Lists, priorities, due dates, sub-steps. Drag onto the calendar to schedule a time.

steps.title: Habits
steps.blurb: Tick once a day. Streak math, weekly heatmaps, and gentle nudges — never guilt.

steps.title: Notes
steps.blurb: Long-form writing with backlinks, folders, and an outliner — plus Memos, a tab for half-formed quick captures.

steps.title: Media
steps.blurb: Track movies, shows, books — plus saved links. Share a page or video to Sajni and it lands here to read later.

steps.title: Finance
steps.blurb: Accounts, categories, transactions, budgets, billers. A calm personal ledger — not a bank app.

steps.title: Analytics
steps.blurb: Streaks, mood trends, weekly Insights — and your #tags, all under one roof.

steps.title: Ask Sajni
steps.blurb: Press ⌘K (or the search pill) for the palette — type @sajni to ask anything. The Projects page has a full Chat tab for longer conversations.

steps.title: You're all set.
steps.blurb: Open Today to take it for a spin. You can always reopen this tour from Settings.
